description: A multiplayer imposter-style game built with Next.js and Convex

instructions.for_agent: Only modify the 'passes' field of features. Do not remove, edit descriptions, or reorder features. Mark a feature as passes:true only after thorough end-to-end testing.
instructions.priority: Work on features in order from top to bottom. Complete one feature at a time.
instructions.testing: Verify each feature works as a user would experience it before marking as passing.

features.description: Waiting lobby has a shared counter with an emoji button that all players can click to increment
steps: Navigate to a game lobby as a player
Verify there is a button with an emoji (e.g. 🎉 or 👆) and a number displayed next to it
Click the button and verify the number increments
Open the same lobby in another browser/tab as a different player
Click the button from the second player and verify both players see the count update in real-time
Refresh the page and verify the counter persists with the correct value

features.description: Game has a phase field that tracks current state: lobby, voting, or results
steps: Check the Convex schema has a phase field on the game document
Verify new games start with phase set to 'lobby'
Confirm the phase field can be updated via a mutation
Verify the game page UI can read and display the current phase

features.description: Host sees a 'VOTE NOW' button that transitions the game to voting phase
steps: Join a game as the host
Verify a 'VOTE NOW' button is visible only to the host
Click the button and verify the game phase changes to 'voting'
Join the same game as a non-host player and verify they do NOT see the 'VOTE NOW' button
Verify all players see the UI update when voting phase begins

features.description: During voting phase, all players see a list of all players they can vote for
steps: Trigger voting phase as host
Verify all players (including host) see a voting interface
Verify the voting interface shows a list of all player names
Verify each player name has a way to select/vote for them (button or radio)
Verify players can see their own name in the list

features.description: Players can submit a vote for who they think is the imposter
steps: During voting phase, select a player from the list
Click to submit the vote
Verify the vote is recorded in the database
Verify the UI shows confirmation that the vote was cast
Verify a player cannot change their vote after submitting

features.description: Voting phase shows which players have voted (but not who they voted for)
steps: During voting phase with multiple players
Have one player submit their vote
Verify all players can see an indicator showing that player has voted
Verify the actual vote choice is NOT revealed to other players
Have remaining players vote and verify indicators update in real-time

features.description: After all players vote, game transitions to results phase and reveals the outcome
steps: Have all players in the game submit their votes
Verify the game automatically transitions to 'results' phase
Verify the results show who received the most votes
Verify the results reveal whether that player was the imposter or not
Verify all players see the same results simultaneously

features.description: Host sees a 'Done' button in results phase that resets the game to lobby
steps: In results phase, verify the host sees a 'Done' button
Verify non-host players do NOT see the 'Done' button
Click 'Done' as host and verify the game phase resets to 'lobby'
Verify all votes are cleared for the new round
Verify all players are returned to the lobby view
